perturbed_task_language: Put the bowl on the top of the drawer
perturbation_semantics: P2 swap relocates the wooden_cabinet (drawer fixture) to the wine_rack_region location at FAR LEFT BACK of table at world (-0.27, -0.27, z=1.13). Meanwhile a wine_rack-style slatted structure occupies the cabinet's original center-back position at world (0.04, -0.24, z=1.18-1.21), and a white_stove sits at RIGHT at world (-0.23, +0.20, z=0.93). 5 prior agent sessions (27+ attempts) failed because they mistakenly identified the visible center-back wooden slatted top as the drawer/cabinet — but that is the swapped-in WINE_RACK, not the wooden_cabinet. The TRUE wooden_cabinet (with dark wood, drawer handle visible from wrist cam) is at the FAR LEFT BACK location matching the goal_swap_t2 audit's documented swap-position (world ~(-0.264, -0.276, ~1.12)).
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot picks bowl and approaches the base-scene cabinet location (center-back), missing the swap-relocated cabinet at far-left-back, so predicate never fires.
strategy_notes: BREAKTHROUGH (after 5 prior failed agent sessions): cross-referenced the SOLVED goal_swap_t2 audit which documented 'P2 swap moves the wooden_cabinet fixture to the wine_rack_region location' with cabinet top at world (-0.264, -0.276, z~1.12). Cluster-scanned my own world_00.npy and confirmed a separate flat surface at world (-0.282, -0.257, z=1.12) (1411 px, FAR LEFT BACK; previously dismissed by prior agents as wine_rack). Wrist-cam verification at eef (-0.27, -0.225, 1.22) revealed a DARK WOODEN BOX with a visible side handle — definitively the wooden_cabinet, NOT a wine_rack. Recipe: (1) pre-position over bowl at world (-0.04, 0.14) at z=1.05; (2) pi0_pick 'pick up the akita black bowl' (peak_lift=0.054m, gripper_opening=0.012m = rim hold confirmed); (3) set_gripper +1 to firm grip; (4) lift to z=1.30 then traverse in 2 waypoints to (-0.27, -0.15, 1.30) to stay within OSC xy step cap; (5) descend to eef (-0.27, -0.225, 1.22) — with bowl-eef y-offset 0.045m this puts bowl center at world (-0.27, -0.27) on the FAR-LEFT cabinet top; (6) release. libero_terminated fired during release. Total successful sequence: 8 commands after the reset.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.instruction: pick up the akita black bowl
